TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: U nisimsiman nu tamdaw tu kanasaw/'a'owang, matiya caay ku ma'uripay, anu eca caay kavana' a dademak. Nika, dademak cangra a mikilim tu kakaenen, anu awaay ku kakaenen i, maka muketep a li-mi ku rakat tu cacay a remi'ad; anu adihay ku kakaenen i, a milawit tu cacay a kong-ci ku rakat nangra. Adihay ku mamakaen nu kanasaw/'a'owang i riyar, ira ku kemaenay tu humung a kanasaw/'a'owang, uya caay kakemaen tu humung a kanasaw/'a'owang i, u maraemeday a vau i riyar atu ci-pi-tung-u ku nikaenan nu nangra. Ruma satu, ira hu ku kemaenay tu kudih nu vutivuting.
S.PHON: o~u~u nisimsiman no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u~u kanasaw/ʡaʡo~uwaŋ, matija ʦaaj ko~u~u maʡo~u~uripaj, ano~u~u əʦa ʦaaj kab~vanaʡ a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak. nika, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ʦaŋra a mikiɾim to~u~u kakaənən, ano~u~u awaaj ko~u~u kakaənən i, maka mo~u~ukətəp a ɾi-mi ko~u~u rakat to~u~u ʦaʦaj a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ; ano~u~u aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u kakaənən i, a miɾawit to~u~u ʦaʦaj a ko~uŋ-ʦi ko~u~u rakat naŋra. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u mamakaən no~u~u kanasaw/ʡaʡo~uwaŋ i rijar, ira ko~u~u kəmaənaj to~u~u ħo~u~umo~u~uŋ a kanasaw/ʡaʡo~uwaŋ, o~u~uja ʦaaj kakəmaən to~u~u ħo~u~umo~u~uŋ a kanasaw/ʡaʡo~uwaŋ i, o~u~u maraəməɬ~ɮaj a b~vao~u~u i rijar ato~u~u ʦi-pi-to~u~uŋ-o~u~u ko~u~u nikaənan no~u~u naŋra. ro~u~uma sato~u~u, ira ħo~u~u ko~u~u kəmaənaj to~u~u ko~u~uɬ~ɮiħ no~u~u b~vo~u~utib~vo~u~utiŋ.
S.FORM: U nisimsiman nu tamdaw tu kanasaw/'a'owang, matiya caay ku ma'uripay, anu eca caay kavana' a dademak. Nika, dademak cangra a mikilim tu kakaenen, anu awaay ku kakaenen i, maka muketep a li-mi ku rakat tu cacay a remi'ad; anu adihay ku kakaenen i, a milawit tu cacay a kong-ci ku rakat nangra. Adihay ku mamakaen nu kanasaw/'a'owang i riyar, ira ku kemaenay tu humung a kanasaw/'a'owang, uya caay kakemaen tu humung a kanasaw/'a'owang i, u maraemeday a vau i riyar atu ci-pi-tung-u ku nikaenan nu nangra. Ruma satu, ira hu ku kemaenay tu kudih nu vutivuting.
S.PHON: o~u~u nisimsiman no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u~u kanasaw/ʡaʡo~uwaŋ, matija ʦaaj ko~u~u maʡo~u~uripaj, ano~u~u əʦa ʦaaj kab~vanaʡ a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak. nika, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak ʦaŋra a mikiɾim to~u~u kakaənən, ano~u~u awaaj ko~u~u kakaənən i, maka mo~u~ukətəp a ɾi-mi ko~u~u rakat to~u~u ʦaʦaj a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ; ano~u~u aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u kakaənən i, a miɾawit to~u~u ʦaʦaj a ko~uŋ-ʦi ko~u~u rakat naŋra. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u mamakaən no~u~u kanasaw/ʡaʡo~uwaŋ i rijar, ira ko~u~u kəmaənaj to~u~u ħo~u~umo~u~uŋ a kanasaw/ʡaʡo~uwaŋ, o~u~uja ʦaaj kakəmaən to~u~u ħo~u~umo~u~uŋ a kanasaw/ʡaʡo~uwaŋ i, o~u~u maraəməɬ~ɮaj a b~vao~u~u i rijar ato~u~u ʦi-pi-to~u~uŋ-o~u~u ko~u~u nikaənan no~u~u naŋra. ro~u~uma sato~u~u, ira ħo~u~u ko~u~u kəmaənaj to~u~u ko~u~uɬ~ɮiħ no~u~u b~vo~u~utib~vo~u~utiŋ.
